-- 1 of 4 --

While macro-influencers can be the most effective,
they’re also the most expensive. In this lesson, I’ll
teach you how to leverage the power of macro-
influencer campaigns to maximize every dollar spent.
First we’ll cover how to attribute ROI, other methods
to reduce cost, followed by my top macro-influencer
content hack and the macro-influencer campaigns
that have been proven to work best.
Personalized Codes (for ROI Attribution)
❏ 	Discounts
❏ 	Free Shipping
❏ 	Store Vouchers
❏ 	Flash Sale
❏ 	Free Gift with Purchase
Tips for Cost Reduction
❏ 	Have a compelling product that influencers will
want
❏ 	Maintain good personal and professional
relationships
❏ 	Build a large enough social following
❏ 	Lock in long-term engagements
❏ 	Find YouTube influencers on Instagram
LESSON:
MACRO-INFLUENCER
COLLABORATIONS

ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Find a macro influencer to work with.
❏ 	Implement some of the strategies in this lesson.
Macro Influencer Campaigns
❏ 	Influencer Cluster Campaign
❏ 	Tag-to-Win Giveaway
Tips for a Giveaway
❏ 	Include a strong, clear CTA
❏ 	Limit the timespan
❏ 	Don’t ask followers to do too much
❏ 	Make it simple
Steps for a Giveaway
❏ 	Choose the right influencer
❏ 	Craft a compelling description
❏ 	Add an extra step to hack engagement
